content.content:
1→# Overzicht voor meeting: AI-instructies, productbacklog en database-persistentie
     2→
     3→**Doel:** Eén document met (1) welke instructies/requirements aan de AI zijn gegeven, (2) welke productbacklog deels is uitgewerkt, en (3) welke onderdelen niet werken of geen/onvolledige database-persistentie hebben.
     4→
     5→---
     6→
     7→## 1. Waar staan de instructies en requirements?
     8→
     9→### Agent-instructies (voor AI-agents)
    10→
    11→- **`AGENTS.md`** — Hoofddocument voor agents:
    12→  - Projectoverzicht (Next.js 16, Drizzle, Neon, Vercel AI SDK)
    13→  - Architectuurlagen (app/, components/, src/ai/, src/services/, src/db/)
    14→  - Conventies (Nederlandse UI, Engelse variabelen, Dutch API-paden)
    15→  - Workflow (bv/bd, beads, lint, commit)
    16→  - **Huidige open beads (20)** — zie sectie 3 hieronder
    17→  - Key files reference (schema, services, scrapers, AI tools)
    18→
    19→- **`CLAUDE.md`** — Cursor/Claude-specifiek:
    20→  - Parallelle uitvoering, bestandsorganisatie
    21→  - Trigger.dev tasks, SPARC-achtige workflow
    22→  - Zelfde technische stack en conventies
    23→
    24→### Productbacklog en requirements (inhoudelijk)
    25→
    26→- **`docs/brainstorms/PRD.md`** — Product Requirements Document (framework-agnostisch):
    27→  - Doel: recruitment workflow (multi-source jobs, normalisatie, matching, pipeline, AI-assistent)
    28→  - User stories o.a.: scraper config, normalisatielaag, dashboard, pause/resume
    29→  - Data model: Job, ScraperConfig, ScrapeResult, Candidate, Application, Interview, Message
    30→  - NFRs: uitbreidbaarheid, betrouwbaarheid, observability, security
    31→
    32→- **`docs/plans/2026-02-21-feat-recruitment-platform-full-implementation-plan.md`** — Uitgewerkte implementatieplan:
    33→  - 7 vertical slices + Agent-Native layer (CLI + MCP)
    34→  - **Phase 1** (Striive + DB): grotendeels afgevinkt in plan; huidige codebase gebruikt geen Motia Steps maar Next.js API + services
    35→  - **Phase 2–7**: veel taken nog als `[ ]` (niet gedaan)
    36→  - Agent-Native pariteitstabel: UI / REST / CLI / MCP per entity
    37→
    38→- **`docs/brainstorms/2026-02-21-recruitment-platform-brainstorm.md`** — Technische brainstorm (schema, Zod, requirements-structuur).
    39→
    40→- **`docs/architecture.md`** — Huidige architectuur: tabellen, cron, security, frontend-routes.
    41→
    42→---
    43→
    44→## 2. Wat is deels gemaakt (productbacklog)?
    45→
    46→| Onderdeel | Status | Opmerking |
    47→|-----------|--------|-----------|
    48→| **Jobs/Opdrachten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | Scraping → normalize → DB (jobs table). Zoeken via API, opdrachten- en opdracht-detailpagina’s bestaan. |
    49→| **Scraper config + resultaten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | scraper_configs, scrape_results. API: configuraties, trigger scrape, gezondheid. Scraper-dashboardpagina. |
    50→| **Kandidaten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | candidates table. POST/GET /api/kandidaten, cv-upload + cv-upload/save. Professionals-pagina’s. |
    51→| **Matches** | ✅ Gedeeltelijk | job_matches: structured matching API schrijft weg. Matching-pagina; goedkeuren/afwijzen via API. |
    52→| **Sollicitaties (applications)** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | applications table. API + pipeline-pagina. |
    53→| **Interviews** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | interviews table. API (GET/POST/PATCH). Interviews-pagina. |
    54→| **Berichten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | messages table. Service createMessage; API /api/berichten. Messages-pagina leest uit DB. |
    55→| **Chat-sessies** | ✅ Schrijven (fire-and-forget) | chat_sessions: wordt gevuld in chat-route; faalt niet als persistence faalt. |
    56→| **Reports** | ✅ Alleen lezen | Genereert rapport uit bestaande match (geen extra persistentie). |
    57→| **Striive scraping** | ⚠️ Stub | scrapeViaModal is stub; Motian-n38: echte scraping moet via Modal (niet Vercel). |
    58→| **Instellingen** | ❌ Alleen UI | Settings-pagina: lege “Binnenkort beschikbaar”-state, geen backend/DB. |
    59→| **AI Grading / CV Beheer** | ❌ Ontbreekt | In sidebar als tab/links; geen aparte “CV Beheer”- of “AI Grading”-pagina’s met eigen flows. |
    60→
    61→---
    62→
    63→## 3. Wat werkt niet of heeft geen/onvolledige database?
    64→
    65→### Geen database / geen persistentie
    66→
    67→| Onderdeel | Situatie |
    68→|-----------|----------|
    69→| **Instellingen** | Pagina toont alleen “Binnenkort beschikbaar”. Geen API, geen tabel, geen opslag. |
    70→| **AI Grading (als aparte flow)** | Matching + structured match schrijven wel naar DB; “AI Grading” als aparte feature met eigen opslag ontbreekt. |
    71→| **CV Beheer (als module)** | CV-upload + save schrijven kandidaat naar DB; er is geen aparte “CV Beheer”-module met eigen persistentie. |
    72→
    73→### Werkt niet of gedeeltelijk
    74→
    75→| Onderdeel | Situatie |
    76→|-----------|----------|
    77→| **Striive scraping** | `scrapeViaModal` is stub. Echte scraping zou via Modal moeten (bead motian-n38); op Vercel niet bruikbaar. |
    78→| **Cron per platform** | Cron negeert per-platform `cronExpression` in DB (motian-uml); één globale cron. |
    79→| **Paginatie** | Nergens geïmplementeerd (motian-o5g); risico op full table scans. |
    80→| **Scoring** | Alleen rule-based (keyword); geen echte semantic/vector matching (motian-scy). |
    81→| **Kandidaat-embeddings** | Alleen jobs hebben embeddings; candidates niet (motian-cyf) → vector matching voor kandidaten onmogelijk. |
    82→| **Zoeken** | LIKE-wildcards niet geëscaped (motian-d5v); geen full-text tsvector/GIN (motian-392). |
    83→| **Sidebar** | Geen directe link naar “Berichten”/Messages (wel Interviews onder Kandidaten) (motian-55q). |
    84→
    85→### Wel DB, maar aandachtspunten
    86→
    87→| Onderdeel | Situatie |
    88→|-----------|----------|
    89→| **Chat-sessies** | Worden weggeschreven maar fire-and-forget; bij fout merkt gebruiker niets, sessie kan ontbreken. |
    90→| **Normalize upsert** | Twee unique constraints (platform+externalId en platform+externalUrl); risico op conflicten (motian-572). |
    91→| **AI-enrichment** | Geen retry (motian-6ad). |
    92→| **GDPR** | Alleen kandidaten; contacten niet meegenomen, geen audit trail (motian-bxq). |
    93→
    94→---
    95→
    96→## 4. Open beads (AGENTS.md) — korte referentie
    97→
    98→- **P0:** motian-n38 — Modal scraping stub (Striive).
    99→- **P1:** motian-scy (scoring), motian-o5g (paginatie), motian-uml (cron per platform).
   100→- **P2:** o.a. motian-m4a (SSE), motian-572 (dual unique), motian-6ad (retry), motian-bxq (GDPR), motian-cyf (candidate embeddings), motian-d5v (LIKE escape), motian-u4c/k2q (UI-components).
   101→- **P3:** o.a. motian-ocy (proxy), motian-u3r (platformlijst), motian-clg (monitoring), motian-392 (full-text), motian-55q (sidebar), motian-z9l (query waterfall).
   102→- **P4:** motian-1ng — Ontbrekende features (AI Grading, CV Beheer, Settings).
   103→
   104→---
   105→
   106→## 5. Samenvatting voor de meeting
   107→
   108→- **Instructies voor de AI** staan in **AGENTS.md** en **CLAUDE.md** (workflow, stack, conventies, beads).
   109→- **Productbacklog/requirements** komen uit **PRD.md** en het **full implementation plan** in `docs/plans/`.
   110→- **Wel DB en grotendeels werkend:** opdrachten, scraper, kandidaten, matches (structured), sollicitaties, interviews, berichten, chat-sessies (met caveat).
   111→- **Geen of nauwelijks DB/persistentie:** Instellingen; AI Grading/CV Beheer als aparte modules.
   112→- **Niet of gedeeltelijk werkend:** Striive (stub), cron per platform, paginatie, semantic scoring, kandidaat-embeddings, zoeken (escaping/full-text), sidebar Berichten.
   113→
   114→Dit document staat in **`docs/meeting-overzicht-ai-instructies-en-backlog.md`** en kan zo in de meeting worden gebruikt.
   115→

# Overzicht voor meeting: AI-instructies, productbacklog en database-persistentie

**Doel:** Eén document met (1) welke instructies/requirements aan de AI zijn gegeven, (2) welke productbacklog deels is uitgewerkt, en (3) welke onderdelen niet werken of geen/onvolledige database-persistentie hebben.

---

## 1. Waar staan de instructies en requirements?

### Agent-instructies (voor AI-agents)

- **`AGENTS.md`** — Hoofddocument voor agents:
  - Projectoverzicht (Next.js 16, Drizzle, Neon, Vercel AI SDK)
  - Architectuurlagen (app/, components/, src/ai/, src/services/, src/db/)
  - Conventies (Nederlandse UI, Engelse variabelen, Dutch API-paden)
  - Workflow (bv/bd, beads, lint, commit)
  - **Huidige open beads (20)** — zie sectie 3 hieronder
  - Key files reference (schema, services, scrapers, AI tools)

- **`CLAUDE.md`** — Cursor/Claude-specifiek:
  - Parallelle uitvoering, bestandsorganisatie
  - Trigger.dev tasks, SPARC-achtige workflow
  - Zelfde technische stack en conventies

### Productbacklog en requirements (inhoudelijk)

- **`docs/brainstorms/PRD.md`** — Product Requirements Document (framework-agnostisch):
  - Doel: recruitment workflow (multi-source jobs, normalisatie, matching, pipeline, AI-assistent)
  - User stories o.a.: scraper config, normalisatielaag, dashboard, pause/resume
  - Data model: Job, ScraperConfig, ScrapeResult, Candidate, Application, Interview, Message
  - NFRs: uitbreidbaarheid, betrouwbaarheid, observability, security

- **`docs/plans/2026-02-21-feat-recruitment-platform-full-implementation-plan.md`** — Uitgewerkte implementatieplan:
  - 7 vertical slices + Agent-Native layer (CLI + MCP)
  - **Phase 1** (Striive + DB): grotendeels afgevinkt in plan; huidige codebase gebruikt geen Motia Steps maar Next.js API + services
  - **Phase 2–7**: veel taken nog als `[ ]` (niet gedaan)
  - Agent-Native pariteitstabel: UI / REST / CLI / MCP per entity

- **`docs/brainstorms/2026-02-21-recruitment-platform-brainstorm.md`** — Technische brainstorm (schema, Zod, requirements-structuur).

- **`docs/architecture.md`** — Huidige architectuur: tabellen, cron, security, frontend-routes.

---

## 2. Wat is deels gemaakt (productbacklog)?

| Onderdeel | Status | Opmerking |
|-----------|--------|-----------|
| **Jobs/Opdrachten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | Scraping → normalize → DB (jobs table). Zoeken via API, opdrachten- en opdracht-detailpagina’s bestaan. |
| **Scraper config + resultaten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | scraper_configs, scrape_results. API: configuraties, trigger scrape, gezondheid. Scraper-dashboardpagina. |
| **Kandidaten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | candidates table. POST/GET /api/kandidaten, cv-upload + cv-upload/save. Professionals-pagina’s. |
| **Matches** | ✅ Gedeeltelijk | job_matches: structured matching API schrijft weg. Matching-pagina; goedkeuren/afwijzen via API. |
| **Sollicitaties (applications)** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | applications table. API + pipeline-pagina. |
| **Interviews** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | interviews table. API (GET/POST/PATCH). Interviews-pagina. |
| **Berichten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | messages table. Service createMessage; API /api/berichten. Messages-pagina leest uit DB. |
| **Chat-sessies** | ✅ Schrijven (fire-and-forget) | chat_sessions: wordt gevuld in chat-route; faalt niet als persistence faalt. |
| **Reports** | ✅ Alleen lezen | Genereert rapport uit bestaande match (geen extra persistentie). |
| **Striive scraping** | ⚠️ Stub | scrapeViaModal is stub; Motian-n38: echte scraping moet via Modal (niet Vercel). |
| **Instellingen** | ❌ Alleen UI | Settings-pagina: lege “Binnenkort beschikbaar”-state, geen backend/DB. |
| **AI Grading / CV Beheer** | ❌ Ontbreekt | In sidebar als tab/links; geen aparte “CV Beheer”- of “AI Grading”-pagina’s met eigen flows. |

---

## 3. Wat werkt niet of heeft geen/onvolledige database?

### Geen database / geen persistentie

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Instellingen** | Pagina toont alleen “Binnenkort beschikbaar”. Geen API, geen tabel, geen opslag. |
| **AI Grading (als aparte flow)** | Matching + structured match schrijven wel naar DB; “AI Grading” als aparte feature met eigen opslag ontbreekt. |
| **CV Beheer (als module)** | CV-upload + save schrijven kandidaat naar DB; er is geen aparte “CV Beheer”-module met eigen persistentie. |

### Werkt niet of gedeeltelijk

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Striive scraping** | `scrapeViaModal` is stub. Echte scraping zou via Modal moeten (bead motian-n38); op Vercel niet bruikbaar. |
| **Cron per platform** | Cron negeert per-platform `cronExpression` in DB (motian-uml); één globale cron. |
| **Paginatie** | Nergens geïmplementeerd (motian-o5g); risico op full table scans. |
| **Scoring** | Alleen rule-based (keyword); geen echte semantic/vector matching (motian-scy). |
| **Kandidaat-embeddings** | Alleen jobs hebben embeddings; candidates niet (motian-cyf) → vector matching voor kandidaten onmogelijk. |
| **Zoeken** | LIKE-wildcards niet geëscaped (motian-d5v); geen full-text tsvector/GIN (motian-392). |
| **Sidebar** | Geen directe link naar “Berichten”/Messages (wel Interviews onder Kandidaten) (motian-55q). |

### Wel DB, maar aandachtspunten

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Chat-sessies** | Worden weggeschreven maar fire-and-forget; bij fout merkt gebruiker niets, sessie kan ontbreken. |
| **Normalize upsert** | Twee unique constraints (platform+externalId en platform+externalUrl); risico op conflicten (motian-572). |
| **AI-enrichment** | Geen retry (motian-6ad). |
| **GDPR** | Alleen kandidaten; contacten niet meegenomen, geen audit trail (motian-bxq). |

---

## 4. Open beads (AGENTS.md) — korte referentie

- **P0:** motian-n38 — Modal scraping stub (Striive).
- **P1:** motian-scy (scoring), motian-o5g (paginatie), motian-uml (cron per platform).
- **P2:** o.a. motian-m4a (SSE), motian-572 (dual unique), motian-6ad (retry), motian-bxq (GDPR), motian-cyf (candidate embeddings), motian-d5v (LIKE escape), motian-u4c/k2q (UI-components).
- **P3:** o.a. motian-ocy (proxy), motian-u3r (platformlijst), motian-clg (monitoring), motian-392 (full-text), motian-55q (sidebar), motian-z9l (query waterfall).
- **P4:** motian-1ng — Ontbrekende features (AI Grading, CV Beheer, Settings).

---

## 5. Samenvatting voor de meeting

- **Instructies voor de AI** staan in **AGENTS.md** en **CLAUDE.md** (workflow, stack, conventies, beads).
- **Productbacklog/requirements** komen uit **PRD.md** en het **full implementation plan** in `docs/plans/`.
- **Wel DB en grotendeels werkend:** opdrachten, scraper, kandidaten, matches (structured), sollicitaties, interviews, berichten, chat-sessies (met caveat).
- **Geen of nauwelijks DB/persistentie:** Instellingen; AI Grading/CV Beheer als aparte modules.
- **Niet of gedeeltelijk werkend:** Striive (stub), cron per platform, paginatie, semantic scoring, kandidaat-embeddings, zoeken (escaping/full-text), sidebar Berichten.

Dit document staat in **`docs/meeting-overzicht-ai-instructies-en-backlog.md`** en kan zo in de meeting worden gebruikt.

3. **Paginatie** - not implemented anywhere
4. **Scoring** - only rule-based keyword matching
5. **Kandidaat-embeddings** - candidates don't have embeddings

8. **Chat-sessies** - fire-and-forget persistence

10. **AI-enrichment** - no retry
11. **GDPR** - only candidates, no audit trail
12. **Instellingen** - only UI, no backend
13. **AI Grading / CV Beheer** - missing

1→import { sql } from "drizzle-orm";
     2→import {
     3→  boolean,
     4→  customType,
     5→  index,
     6→  integer,
     7→  jsonb,
     8→  pgTable,
     9→  real,
    10→  text,
    11→  timestamp,
    12→  uniqueIndex,
    13→  uuid,
    14→} from "drizzle-orm/pg-core";
    15→
    16→// pgvector custom column type for Drizzle
    17→const vector = customType<{
    18→  data: number[];
    19→  driverParam: string;
    20→  config: { dimensions: number };
    21→}>({
    22→  dataType(config) {
    23→    return `vector(${config?.dimensions ?? 512})`;
    24→  },
    25→  fromDriver(value: unknown): number[] {
    26→    if (typeof value === "string") {
    27→      return value.replace(/^\[/, "").replace(/\]$/, "").split(",").map(Number);
    28→    }
    29→    return value as number[];
    30→  },
    31→  toDriver(value: number[]): string {
    32→    return `[${value.join(",")}]`;
    33→  },
    34→});
    35→
    36→// ========== Scraper Configuratie ==========
    37→export const scraperConfigs = pgTable(
    38→  "scraper_configs",
    39→  {
    40→    id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
    41→    platform: text("platform").notNull(),
    42→    baseUrl: text("base_url").notNull(),
    43→    isActive: boolean("is_active").notNull().default(true),
    44→    parameters: jsonb("parameters").default({}),
    45→    authConfigEncrypted: text("auth_config_encrypted"),
    46→    cronExpression: text("cron_expression").default("0 0 */4 * * *"),
    47→    lastRunAt: timestamp("last_run_at"),
    48→    lastRunStatus: text("last_run_status"),
    49→    consecutiveFailures: integer("consecutive_failures").default(0),
    50→    createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(),
    51→    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at").defaultNow(),
    52→  },
    53→  (table) => ({
    54→    platformUniqueIdx: uniqueIndex("uq_scraper_configs_platform").on(table.platform),
    55→  }),
    56→);
    57→
    58→// ========== Scrape Resultaten ==========
    59→export const scrapeResults = pgTable(
    60→  "scrape_results",
    61→  {
    62→    id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
    63→    configId: uuid("config_id").references(() => scraperConfigs.id, {
    64→      onDelete: "set null",
    65→    }),
    66→    platform: text("platform").notNull(),
    67→    runAt: timestamp("run_at").defaultNow(),
    68→    durationMs: integer("duration_ms"),
    69→    jobsFound: integer("jobs_found").default(0),
    70→    jobsNew: integer("jobs_new").default(0),
    71→    duplicates: integer("duplicates").default(0),
    72→    status: text("status").notNull(), // "success" | "partial" | "failed"
    73→    errors: jsonb("errors").default([]),
    74→  },
    75→  (table) => ({
    76→    configIdIdx: index("idx_scrape_results_config_id").on(table.configId),
    77→    runAtIdx: index("idx_scrape_results_run_at").on(table.runAt),
    78→    platformIdx: index("idx_scrape_results_platform").on(table.platform),
    79→  }),
    80→);
    81→
    82→// ========== Opdrachten ==========
    83→export const jobs = pgTable(
    84→  "jobs",
    85→  {
    86→    id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
    87→
    88→    // === Identificatie ===
    89→    platform: text("platform").notNull(), // "striive", "indeed", "linkedin", "REDACTED", "flextender"
    90→    externalId: text("external_id").notNull(), // Striive: referentiecode (bijv. "BTBDN000695")
    91→    externalUrl: text("external_url"), // Volledige URL naar opdracht detail pagina
    92→    clientReferenceCode: text("client_reference_code"), // Striive: referentiecode opdrachtgever
    93→
    94→    // === Kern informatie ===
    95→    title: text("title").notNull(),
    96→    company: text("company"), // Opdrachtgever: "Belastingdienst", "Rabobank"
    97→    contractLabel: text("contract_label"), // Broker/tussenpersoon: "Between", "Striive"
    98→    location: text("location"), // "Utrecht - Utrecht", "Den Haag - Zuid-Holland"
    99→    province: text("province"), // Geëxtraheerd uit location
   100→    description: text("description"),
   101→
   102→    // === Tarieven & Posities ===
   103→    rateMin: integer("rate_min"),
   104→    rateMax: integer("rate_max"), // Striive: "Wat is het uurtarief?" (max)
   105→    currency: text("currency").default("EUR"),
   106→    positionsAvailable: integer("positions_available").default(1),
   107→
   108→    // === Data & Deadlines ===
   109→    startDate: timestamp("start_date"),
   110→    endDate: timestamp("end_date"),
   111→    applicationDeadline: timestamp("application_deadline"),
   112→    postedAt: timestamp("posted_at"),
   113→
   114→    // === Werkcondities ===
   115→    contractType: text("contract_type"), // "freelance", "interim", "vast", "opdracht"
   116→    workArrangement: text("work_arrangement"), // "hybride", "op_locatie", "remote"
   117→    allowsSubcontracting: boolean("allows_subcontracting"),
   118→
   119→    // === Gestructureerde Eisen ===
   120→    requirements: jsonb("requirements").default([]),
   121→    wishes: jsonb("wishes").default([]),
   122→    competences: jsonb("competences").default([]),
   123→    conditions: jsonb("conditions").default([]),
   124→
   125→    // === Verrijkte Data ===
   126→    hoursPerWeek: integer("hours_per_week"),
   127→    minHoursPerWeek: integer("min_hours_per_week"),
   128→    extensionPossible: boolean("extension_possible"),
   129→    countryCode: text("country_code"),
   130→    remunerationType: text("remuneration_type"),
   131→    workExperienceYears: integer("work_experience_years"),
   132→    numberOfViews: integer("number_of_views"),
   133→    attachments: jsonb("attachments").default([]),
   134→    questions: jsonb("questions").default([]),
   135→    languages: jsonb("languages").default([]),
   136→    descriptionSummary: jsonb("description_summary"),
   137→    faqAnswers: jsonb("faq_answers").default([]),
   138→    agentContact: jsonb("agent_contact"),
   139→    recruiterContact: jsonb("recruiter_contact"),
   140→
   141→    // === Locatie & Organisatie ===
   142→    latitude: real("latitude"),
   143→    longitude: real("longitude"),
   144→    postcode: text("postcode"),
   145→    companyLogoUrl: text("company_logo_url"),
   146→
   147→    // === Opdracht Kenmerken ===
   148→    educationLevel: text("education_level"),
   149→    durationMonths: integer("duration_months"),
   150→    sourceUrl: text("source_url"),
   151→    sourcePlatform: text("source_platform"),
   152→    categories: jsonb("categories").default([]),
   153→    companyAddress: text("company_address"),
   154→
   155→    // === Metadata ===
   156→    scrapedAt: timestamp("scraped_at").defaultNow(),
   157→    deletedAt: timestamp("deleted_at"), // PRD 7.2: soft-delete
   158→    rawPayload: jsonb("raw_payload"),
   159→    embedding: vector("embedding", { dimensions: 512 }),
   160→  },
   161→  (table) => ({
   162→    platformExternalIdx: uniqueIndex("uq_platform_external_id").on(
   163→      table.platform,
   164→      table.externalId,
   165→    ),
   166→    titleBtreeIdx: index("idx_jobs_title_btree").on(table.title),
   167→    platformIdx: index("idx_jobs_platform").on(table.platform),
   168→    scrapedAtIdx: index("idx_jobs_scraped_at").on(table.scrapedAt),
   169→    deletedAtIdx: index("idx_jobs_deleted_at").on(table.deletedAt),
   170→    deadlineIdx: index("idx_jobs_deadline").on(table.applicationDeadline),
   171→    platformUrlIdx: index("idx_platform_external_url").on(table.platform, table.externalUrl),
   172→  }),
   173→);

   175→// ========== Kandidaten ==========
   176→export const candidates = pgTable(
   177→  "candidates",
   178→  {
   179→    id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
   180→    name: text("name").notNull(),
   181→    email: text("email"),
   182→    phone: text("phone"),
   183→    role: text("role"), // gewenste functie
   184→    location: text("location"),
   185→    province: text("province"),
   186→    skills: jsonb("skills").default([]),
   187→    experience: jsonb("experience").default([]),
   188→    preferences: jsonb("preferences").default({}),
   189→    resumeUrl: text("resume_url"),
   190→    linkedinUrl: text("linkedin_url"),
   191→    headline: text("headline"),
   192→    source: text("source"), // "linkedin", "manual", "import", "mcp"
   193→    notes: text("notes"),
   194→    hourlyRate: integer("hourly_rate"),
   195→    availability: text("availability"), // "direct", "1_maand", "3_maanden"
   196→    embedding: vector("embedding", { dimensions: 512 }),
   197→    resumeRaw: text("resume_raw"),
   198→    resumeParsedAt: timestamp("resume_parsed_at", { withTimezone: true }),
   199→    skillsStructured: jsonb("skills_structured"),
   200→    education: jsonb("education"),
   201→    certifications: jsonb("certifications"),
   202→    languageSkills: jsonb("language_skills"),
   203→    consentGranted: boolean("consent_granted").default(false),
   204→    dataRetentionUntil: timestamp("data_retention_until"),
   205→    createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(),
   206→    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at").defaultNow(),
   207→    deletedAt: timestamp("deleted_at"),
   208→  },
   209→  (table) => ({
   210→    emailUniqueIdx: uniqueIndex("uq_candidates_email")
   211→      .on(table.email)
   212→      .where(sql`email IS NOT NULL`),
   213→    nameIdx: index("idx_candidates_name").on(table.name),
   214→    provinceIdx: index("idx_candidates_province").on(table.province),
   215→    deletedAtIdx: index("idx_candidates_deleted_at").on(table.deletedAt),
   216→  }),
   217→);
   218→
   219→// ========== Job Matches ==========
   220→export const jobMatches = pgTable(
   221→  "job_matches",
   222→  {
   223→    id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
   224→    jobId: uuid("job_id").references(() => jobs.id, { onDelete: "set null" }),
   225→    candidateId: uuid("candidate_id").references(() => candidates.id, {
   226→      onDelete: "set null",
   227→    }),
   228→    matchScore: real("match_score").notNull(), // 0-100
   229→    confidence: real("confidence"), // 0-100
   230→    reasoning: text("reasoning"),
   231→    model: text("model"), // "gpt-4o", etc.
   232→    promptVersion: text("prompt_version"),
   233→    status: text("status").notNull().default("pending"), // "pending" | "approved" | "rejected"
   234→    reviewedBy: text("reviewed_by"),
   235→    reviewedAt: timestamp("reviewed_at"),
   236→    criteriaBreakdown: jsonb("criteria_breakdown"),
   237→    riskProfile: jsonb("risk_profile"),
   238→    enrichmentSuggestions: jsonb("enrichment_suggestions"),
   239→    recommendation: text("recommendation"),
   240→    recommendationConfidence: real("recommendation_confidence"),
   241→    assessmentModel: text("assessment_model"),
   242→    createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(),
   243→  },
   244→  (table) => ({
   245→    jobIdIdx: index("idx_job_matches_job_id").on(table.jobId),
   246→    candidateIdIdx: index("idx_job_matches_candidate_id").on(table.candidateId),
   247→    statusIdx: index("idx_job_matches_status").on(table.status),
   248→    jobCandidateUniqueIdx: uniqueIndex("uq_job_matches_job_candidate").on(
   249→      table.jobId,
   250→      table.candidateId,
   251→    ),
   252→  }),
   253→);
   254→
   255→// ========== Sollicitaties (Applications) ==========
   256→export const applications = pgTable(
   257→  "applications",
   258→  {
   259→    id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
   260→    jobId: uuid("job_id").references(() => jobs.id, { onDelete: "set null" }),
   261→    candidateId: uuid("candidate_id").references(() => candidates.id, { onDelete: "set null" }),
   262→    matchId: uuid("match_id").references(() => jobMatches.id, { onDelete: "set null" }),
   263→    stage: text("stage").notNull().default("new"), // "new" | "screening" | "interview" | "offer" | "hired" | "rejected"
   264→    source: text("source").default("manual"), // "match" | "manual" | "import"
   265→    notes: text("notes"),
   266→    createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(),
   267→    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at").defaultNow(),
   268→    deletedAt: timestamp("deleted_at"),
   269→  },
   270→  (table) => ({
   271→    jobIdIdx: index("idx_applications_job_id").on(table.jobId),
   272→    candidateIdIdx: index("idx_applications_candidate_id").on(table.candidateId),
   273→    stageIdx: index("idx_applications_stage").on(table.stage),
   274→    jobCandidateUniqueIdx: uniqueIndex("uq_applications_job_candidate").on(
   275→      table.jobId,
   276→      table.candidateId,
   277→    ),
   278→  }),
   279→);
   280→
   281→// ========== Interviews ==========
   282→export const interviews = pgTable(
   283→  "interviews",
   284→  {
   285→    id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
   286→    applicationId: uuid("application_id")
   287→      .references(() => applications.id, { onDelete: "cascade" })
   288→      .notNull(),
   289→    scheduledAt: timestamp("scheduled_at").notNull(),
   290→    duration: integer("duration").default(60), // minuten
   291→    type: text("type").notNull(), // "phone" | "video" | "onsite" | "technical"
   292→    interviewer: text("interviewer").notNull(),
   293→    location: text("location"),
   294→    status: text("status").notNull().default("scheduled"), // "scheduled" | "completed" | "cancelled"
   295→    feedback: text("feedback"),
   296→    rating: integer("rating"), // 1-5
   297→    createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(),
   298→    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at").defaultNow(),
   299→    deletedAt: timestamp("deleted_at"),
   300→  },
   301→  (table) => ({
   302→    applicationIdIdx: index("idx_interviews_application_id").on(table.applicationId),
   303→    scheduledAtIdx: index("idx_interviews_scheduled_at").on(table.scheduledAt),
   304→    statusIdx: index("idx_interviews_status").on(table.status),
   305→    deletedAtIdx: index("idx_interviews_deleted_at").on(table.deletedAt),
   306→  }),
   307→);
   308→
   309→// ========== GDPR Audit Log ==========
   310→export const gdprAuditLog = pgTable(
   311→  "gdpr_audit_log",
   312→  {
   313→    id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
   314→    action: text("action").notNull(), // export_candidate | erase_candidate | scrub_contact | export_contact
   315→    subjectType: text("subject_type").notNull(), // candidate | contact
   316→    subjectId: text("subject_id").notNull(), // candidate ID or contact identifier
   317→    requestedBy: text("requested_by").notNull(), // actor who initiated the action
   318→    reason: text("reason"),
   319→    details: jsonb("details").default({}),
   320→    createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(),
   321→  },
   322→  (table) => ({
   323→    subjectIdx: index("idx_gdpr_audit_subject").on(table.subjectType, table.subjectId),
   324→    actionIdx: index("idx_gdpr_audit_action").on(table.action),
   325→    createdAtIdx: index("idx_gdpr_audit_created_at").on(table.createdAt),
   326→  }),
   327→);
   328→
   329→// ========== Chat Sessies ==========
   330→export const chatSessions = pgTable(
   331→  "chat_sessions",
   332→  {
   333→    id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
   334→    sessionId: text("session_id").notNull(), // Client-provided session identifier
   335→    messages: jsonb("messages").notNull().default([]), // Array of { role, content, toolInvocations? }
   336→    context: jsonb("context").default({}), // Route, entityId, entityType snapshot
   337→    messageCount: integer("message_count").default(0),
   338→    createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(),
   339→    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at").defaultNow(),
   340→  },
   341→  (table) => ({
   342→    sessionIdUniqueIdx: uniqueIndex("uq_chat_sessions_session_id").on(table.sessionId),
   343→    updatedAtIdx: index("idx_chat_sessions_updated_at").on(table.updatedAt),
   344→  }),
   345→);

   347→// ========== Berichten (Messages) ==========
   348→export const messages = pgTable(

1→import { and, desc, eq, isNull, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
     2→import {
     3→  Activity,
     4→  ArrowRight,
     5→  BarChart3,
     6→  Briefcase,
     7→  Building2,
     8→  Clock,
     9→  MapPin,
    10→  RefreshCw,
    11→  TrendingUp,
    12→  Zap,
    13→} from "lucide-react";
    14→import Link from "next/link";
    15→import { KPICard } from "@/components/shared/kpi-card";
    16→import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
    17→import { db } from "@/src/db";
    18→import { jobs, scrapeResults, scraperConfigs } from "@/src/db/schema";
    19→
    20→export const dynamic = "force-dynamic";
    21→
    22→export default async function OverzichtPage() {
    23→  const sevenDaysAgo = new Date();
    24→  sevenDaysAgo.setDate(sevenDaysAgo.getDate() - 7);
    25→
    26→  // Fetch all dashboard data in parallel (consolidated counts to reduce DB connections)
    27→  const [
    28→    jobStats,
    29→    platformCounts,
    30→    recentJobs,
    31→    activeScrapers,
    32→    recentScrapes,
    33→    topCompanies,
    34→    locationCounts,
    35→  ] = await Promise.all([
    36→    // Total + weekly counts in one query using FILTER
    37→    db
    38→      .select({
    39→        total: sql<number>`count(*)::int`,
    40→        weeklyNew: sql<number>`count(*) filter (where ${jobs.scrapedAt} >= ${sevenDaysAgo})::int`,
    41→      })
    42→      .from(jobs)
    43→      .where(isNull(jobs.deletedAt)),
    44→    // Jobs per platform
    45→    db
    46→      .select({
    47→        platform: jobs.platform,
    48→        count: sql<number>`count(*)::int`,
    49→      })
    50→      .from(jobs)
    51→      .where(isNull(jobs.deletedAt))
    52→      .groupBy(jobs.platform)
    53→      .orderBy(sql`count(*) desc`),
    54→    // Last 5 jobs
    55→    db
    56→      .select({
    57→        id: jobs.id,
    58→        title: jobs.title,
    59→        company: jobs.company,
    60→        platform: jobs.platform,
    61→        location: jobs.location,
    62→        scrapedAt: jobs.scrapedAt,
    63→      })
    64→      .from(jobs)
    65→      .where(isNull(jobs.deletedAt))
    66→      .orderBy(desc(jobs.scrapedAt))
    67→      .limit(5),
    68→    // Active scraper configs
    69→    db.select().from(scraperConfigs).where(eq(scraperConfigs.isActive, true)),
    70→    // Recent scrape results
    71→    db.select().from(scrapeResults).orderBy(desc(scrapeResults.runAt)).limit(5),
    72→    // Top companies by job count
    73→    db
    74→      .select({
    75→        company: jobs.company,
    76→        count: sql<number>`count(*)::int`,
    77→      })
    78→      .from(jobs)
    79→      .where(and(isNull(jobs.deletedAt), sql`${jobs.company} is not null`))
    80→      .groupBy(jobs.company)

content.text:
Excellent! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the codebase. Let me compile a final comprehensive map:

## Comprehensive Motian Recruitment Platform - Codebase Map

Based on my thorough exploration, here's the complete architectural overview of the Motian recruitment platform:

### **1. OVERALL FILE STRUCTURE**

```
/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/
├── app/                          # Next.js App Router
├── src/                          # Source code (TypeScript utilities, services, AI)
├── components/                   # React components
├── trigger/                      # Trigger.dev scheduled tasks & background jobs
├── tests/                        # Test files
├── docs/                         # Documentation
├── drizzle/                      # Database migrations
├── fumadocs/                     # Documentation site
└── public/                       # Static assets
```

---

### **2. DATABASE SCHEMA** 
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/src/db/schema.ts`

**Key Tables:**

1. **scraperConfigs** - Scraper configurations (platform, cron schedules, auth)
2. **scrapeResults** - Scrape execution logs (platform, status, job counts, errors)
3. **jobs** (Opdrachten) - Job postings with 50+ fields:
   - Identification: `platform`, `externalId`, `externalUrl`
   - Core: `title`, `company`, `location`, `province`
   - Rates: `rateMin`, `rateMax`, `currency`, `contractType`, `workArrangement`
   - Structured: `requirements`, `wishes`, `competences`, `conditions`
   - Metadata: `embedding` (512-dim vector), `rawPayload`, `deletedAt`
4. **candidates** (Kandidaten) - Professional profiles:
   - Basic: `name`, `email`, `phone`, `role`, `location`
   - Skills: `skills`, `experience`, `skillsStructured`, `languageSkills`
   - CV: `resumeUrl`, `resumeRaw`, `resumeParsedAt`
   - GDPR: `consentGranted`, `dataRetentionUntil`, `deletedAt`
   - Embedding for semantic search
5. **jobMatches** - AI-generated matches:
   - `matchScore` (0-100), `confidence`, `status` (pending/approved/rejected)
   - `criteriaBreakdown`, `riskProfile`, `enrichmentSuggestions`
   - `recommendation`, `assessmentModel`
6. **applications** (Sollicitaties) - Application tracking:
   - `stage` (new/screening/interview/offer/hired/rejected)
   - `source` (manual/match/import)
7. **interviews** - Interview scheduling:
   - `type` (phone/video/onsite/technical)
   - `status`, `feedback`, `rating` (1-5)
8. **messages** (Berichten) - Communication log:
   - `direction` (inbound/outbound), `channel` (email/phone/platform)
9. **chatSessions** - Conversation memory:
   - `sessionId`, `messages` (array), `context` (route/entityId/type)
10. **gdprAuditLog** - GDPR compliance tracking

**Indexes:** Optimized for job search, candidate lookup, match filtering, GDPR queries

---

### **3. API ROUTES** 
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/app/api/`

#### **Kandidaten (Professionals)**
- `POST /api/kandidaten` - Create candidate
- `GET /api/kandidaten` - List all candidates (with filters)
- `GET/PUT /api/kandidaten/[id]` - Get/update single candidate
- `POST /api/kandidaten/[id]/notities` - Add notes to candidate
- `POST /api/cv-upload` - Upload CV file
- `POST /api/cv-upload/save` - Save parsed CV to candidate

#### **Opdrachten (Jobs)**
- `GET /api/opdrachten` - List jobs with pagination
- `GET /api/opdrachten/[id]` - Get job detail
- `GET /api/opdrachten/zoeken` - Search jobs (multi-field search with ILIKE):
  - Query params: `q` (search term), `platform`, `provincie`
  - Returns: paginated results with total count
- `POST /api/scraper-configuraties` - Create scraper config
- `GET/PUT /api/scraper-configuraties/[id]` - Manage scraper configs

#### **Matches**
- `GET /api/matches` - List all matches with filters
- `GET/PUT /api/matches/[id]` - Get/update match status
- `POST /api/matches/auto` - Trigger auto-matching (candidate→jobs or job→candidates)
- `POST /api/matches/genereren` - Generate matches batch
- `POST /api/matches/structured` - Run structured matching with AI

#### **Sollicitaties (Applications)**
- `POST /api/sollicitaties` - Create application
- `GET/PUT /api/sollicitaties/[id]` - Get/update application stage
- `GET /api/sollicitaties/stats` - Get pipeline statistics

#### **Interviews**
- `POST /api/interviews` - Schedule interview
- `GET/PUT /api/interviews/[id]` - Get/update interview feedback

#### **Berichten (Messages)**
- `POST /api/berichten` - Send message
- `GET /api/berichten` - List messages (filtered by application/direction/channel)
- `GET/DELETE /api/berichten/[id]` - Get/delete message

#### **AI & Scraping**
- `POST /api/chat` - Claude AI chat with tools (rate limited: 20/min)
  - Accepts `messages`, `context` (sessionId, route, entityId)
  - Returns streaming text with tool invocations
- `POST /api/cv-analyse` - Analyze CV for skills/experience
- `POST /api/scrape/starten` - Trigger scraper manually
- `GET /api/scrape-resultaten` - View scrape results and logs

#### **GDPR Compliance**
- `POST /api/gdpr/export/[kandidaatId]` - Export candidate data (GDPR Art. 15)
- `DELETE /api/gdpr/verwijder/[kandidaatId]` - Erase candidate (GDPR Art. 17)
- `POST /api/gdpr/contacten/export` - Export contact data by email
- `POST /api/gdpr/contacten/verwijder` - Scrub contact gegevens

#### **System**
- `GET /api/gezondheid` - Health check endpoint
- `GET /api/revalidate` - ISR revalidation trigger
- `POST /api/embeddings/backfill` - Bulk generate embeddings

---

### **4. PAGES (Next.js App Router)**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/app/`

| Page | Route | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| **Dashboard** | `/overzicht` | KPIs: total jobs, weekly new, platform distribution, scraper health, top companies |
| **Jobs** | `/opdrachten` | Search/filter jobs, view details, scraper results |
| **Job Detail** | `/opdrachten/[id]` | Full job details, requirements, matching candidates |
| **Professionals** | `/professionals` | Candidate pool with search, skills filter |
| **Candidate Detail** | `/professionals/[id]` | CV view, match history, applications, notes |
| **Pipeline** | `/pipeline` | Funnel visualization (new→screening→interview→offer→hired) |
| **Interviews** | `/interviews` | Schedule, manage, rate interviews |
| **Matching** | `/matching` | AI matching tab (primary feature) |
| **AI Grading** | `/matching?tab=grading` | Grade candidates against job requirements |
| **CV Analysis** | `/matching?tab=cv` | Analyze and extract CV data |
| **Scraper** | `/scraper` | Analytics: config status, run logs, error tracking |
| **Chat** | `/chat` | Claude AI assistant with tool access |
| **Reports** | `/reports/[id]` | Generated analysis reports |
| **Settings** | `/settings` | Configuration page |
| **Visual Explainer** | `/visual-explainer` | Interactive feature walkthrough GIF |

---

### **5. SIDEBAR / NAVIGATION**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/components/app-sidebar.tsx`

**Navigation Structure:**
```
Motian (Pro)
├── Overzicht (Dashboard icon)
├── Vacatures (Briefcase)
├── Kandidaten (Users)
│   ├── Talent Pool
│   ├── Pipeline
│   └── Interviews
├── Matching (Zap)
│   ├── AI Matching
│   ├── AI Grading
│   └── CV Analyse
├── Scraper Analytics (Activity)
└── Chat (MessageSquare)
```

**Key Components:**
- `app-sidebar.tsx` - Main sidebar layout
- `nav-main.tsx` - Navigation items
- `nav-user.tsx` - User menu
- `team-switcher.tsx` - Team selector
- `sidebar-layout.tsx` - Sidebar wrapper
- `top-nav.tsx` - Top navigation bar
- `page-header.tsx` - Page header with breadcrumbs

---

### **6. SERVICES DIRECTORY**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/src/services/`

| Service | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **candidates.ts** | CRUD: create, read, list, update, delete candidates |
| **jobs.ts** | Job management: search, create, update, delete |
| **matches.ts** | Match CRUD: list, create, approve, reject matches |
| **applications.ts** | Application pipeline tracking |
| **interviews.ts** | Interview scheduling and management |
| **messages.ts** | Message storage and retrieval |
| **auto-matching.ts** | Match generation algorithm |
| **structured-matching.ts** | Deep AI matching with criterion breakdown |
| **match-generation.ts** | Batch match generation |
| **match-judge.ts** | Match quality assessment |
| **scoring.ts** | Candidate scoring weights & hybrid blend algorithm |
| **grading.ts** | AI-based candidate grading against requirements |
| **ai-enrichment.ts** | Enrich job/candidate data with AI |
| **cv-parser.ts** | Extract skills, experience from CV text |
| **requirement-extraction.ts** | Extract structured requirements from job descriptions |
| **normalize.ts** | Normalize job data (skills, locations, etc.) |
| **embedding.ts** | Generate vector embeddings (pgvector) |
| **embeddings-batch.ts** | Bulk embedding generation |
| **scrapers.ts** | Orchestrate scraper execution |
| **scrape-pipeline.ts** | Scraper circuit breaker + scheduler |
| **scrape-results.ts** | Log and retrieve scrape results |
| **record-scrape-result.ts** | Record scrape metrics |
| **workspace.ts** | Workspace summary (stats, health) |
| **gdpr.ts** | Data export/deletion for compliance |
| **slack-notifications.ts** | Send alerts to Slack |
| **report-generator.ts** | Generate matching reports |
| **operations-console.ts** | Batch operations (import, scoring) |

---

### **7. SCRAPERS**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/src/services/scrapers/`

1. **striive.ts** - Striive platform scraper
   - Extracts: referentiecode, client codes, rates, requirements
   - Handles: contract labels, position counts
2. **opdrachtoverheid.ts** - Government jobs scraper
   - Extracts: government roles, salary bands, requirements
3. **flextender.ts** - Flextender platform scraper
   - Extracts: contract terms, benefits, conditions

Each scraper:
- Fetches from platform API/website
- Parses job details
- Deduplicates using `platform + externalId`
- Stores raw payload
- Returns: jobs found, new count, duplicates, status

---

### **8. AI-RELATED FILES**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/src/ai/`

#### **Core Agent**
- **agent.ts** - Chat model & tool registry:
  - Model: `gpt5Nano` (Claude model)
  - System prompt builder with workspace context
  - Recruiter tools registry (66+ tools)

#### **AI Tools** (in `tools/` subdirectory)

**Opdrachten (Jobs):**
- `query-opdrachten.ts` - Search/filter jobs
- `get-opdracht-detail.ts` - Fetch job with embedded requirements
- `opdrachten-mutatie.ts` - Update/delete jobs

**Kandidaten (Professionals):**
- `kandidaten.ts` - Search, create, update, delete candidates
- `voeg-notitie-toe.ts` - Add notes
- `auto-match-kandidaat.ts` - Trigger matching

**Matches:**
- `matches.ts` - CRUD matches
- `match-kandidaten.ts` - Generate matches
- `structured-match.ts` - Deep matching with criteria breakdown

**Sollicitaties (Applications):**
- `sollicitaties.ts` - Track application pipeline

**Interviews:**
- `interviews.ts` - Schedule & manage interviews

**Berichten (Messages):**
- `berichten.ts` - Send & retrieve messages

**System:**
- `analyse-data.ts` - Analyze workspace data
- `trigger-scraper.ts` - Manually trigger scraper
- `operations-console.ts` - Batch import, scoring, GDPR review
- `gdpr.ts` - Export/delete candidate data

---

### **9. COMPONENTS DIRECTORY**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/components/`

#### **Main Components**
- `app-sidebar.tsx` - Collapsible sidebar with navigation
- `sidebar.tsx` - Sidebar wrapper
- `sidebar-layout.tsx` - Layout with sidebar
- `top-nav.tsx` - Top navigation bar

#### **Candidate Management**
- `add-candidate-dialog.tsx` - Modal to create candidate
- `candidate-notes.tsx` - Display/edit candidate notes
- `edit-candidate-fields.tsx` - Edit form for candidate properties
- `delete-candidate-button.tsx` - Soft-delete UI
- `draggable-candidate.tsx` - Drag-drop support

#### **Job Management**
- `job-card.tsx` - Job summary card
- `job-list-item.tsx` - Job in list view
- `job-detail.tsx` - Full job detail view
- `droppable-vacancy.tsx` - Drop zone for candidates
- `opdrachten-sidebar.tsx` - Job filter sidebar
- `opdrachten-layout-shell.tsx` - Job page layout

#### **Matching & Scoring**
- `ai-grading.tsx` - Grade candidates with AI
- `auto-match-results.tsx` - Display match results
- `score-ring.tsx` - Circular score visualization
- `skills-radar.tsx` - Radar chart for skills
- `skills-tags.tsx` - Skill badges

#### **CV Processing**
- `cv-upload-sidebar.tsx` - Drag-drop CV upload
- `cv-drop-zone.tsx` - Drop zone for files
- `cv-document-viewer.tsx` - PDF/text viewer
- `cv-document-viewer-lazy.tsx` - Lazy-loaded viewer

#### **Chat & AI**
- `chat/` subdirectory:
  - `chat-messages.tsx` - Message display
  - `chat-panel.tsx` - Input panel
  - `chat-tool-call.tsx` - Tool invocation display
  - `chat-context-provider.tsx` - Session context
  - `genui/` - GenUI components for tool results:
    - `kandidaat-card.tsx` - Candidate card
    - `opdracht-card.tsx` - Job card
    - `match-card.tsx` - Match result card

#### **Matching Components**
- `matching/` subdirectory:
  - `cv-match-card.tsx` - CV match display
  - `cv-pdf-panel.tsx` - PDF viewer in matching
  - `cv-profile-card.tsx` - Profile summary
  - `criteria-breakdown-chart.tsx` - Match criteria breakdown
  - `pipeline-workflow-canvas.tsx` - Pipeline visualization
  - `pipeline-progress.tsx` - Progress indicator
  - `recent-analyses.tsx` - Analysis history

#### **Shared Components**
- `shared/` subdirectory:
  - `empty-state.tsx` - Empty state placeholder
  - `filter-tabs.tsx` - Tab navigation
  - `kpi-card.tsx` - KPI metric display
  - `pagination.tsx` - Pagination controls

#### **UI Components** (Shadcn/UI)
- `ui/` - 27 UI components (badge, button, card, dialog, etc.)

#### **Utilities**
- `status-badge.tsx` - Status indicator
- `team-switcher.tsx` - Team selector
- `visual-json-viewer.tsx` - JSON display
- `skills-radar.tsx`, `skills-tags.tsx` - Skill visualization

---

### **10. TRIGGER.DEV SCHEDULED TASKS**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/trigger/`

| Task | Schedule | Purpose |
|------|----------|---------|
| **scrape-pipeline.ts** | Every 4 hours | Orchestrate scrapers (circuit breaker, schedule check) |
| **scraper-health.ts** | Periodic | Monitor scraper status, failure recovery |
| **slack-notifications.ts** | As triggered | Send alerts to Slack channel |
| **embeddings-batch.ts** | Nightly | Generate embeddings for new jobs/candidates |
| **candidate-dedup.ts** | Daily | Deduplicate candidates by email/name |
| **data-retention.ts** | Daily | Delete candidates exceeding retention period (GDPR) |
| **match-staleness.ts** | Weekly | Archive old pending matches |
| **vacancy-expiry.ts** | Weekly | Mark expired job postings |

---

### **11. SEARCH IMPLEMENTATION**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/app/api/opdrachten/zoeken/route.ts`

**Search Strategy:**
- Multi-field text search using SQL `ILIKE` (case-insensitive)
- Fields searched: `title`, `company`, `description`, `location`, `platform`
- Filters: `platform`, `provincie` (province)
- Pagination: configurable limit/offset
- Returns: paginated results with total count

**Semantic Search (Upcoming):**
- Vector embeddings stored in `jobs.embedding` (512-dim pgvector)
- Embeddings also on `candidates.embedding`
- Enables similarity-based matching

---

### **12. MCP SERVER**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/src/mcp/`

- **server.ts** - MCP server implementation (stdio transport)
- **tools/** subdirectory:
  - `index.ts` - Tool registry
  - `kandidaten.ts` - Candidate tools (search, CRUD)
  - `vacatures.ts` - Job tools (search, detail)
  - `matches.ts` - Match management
  - `pipeline.ts` - Pipeline operations
  - `gdpr-ops.ts` - GDPR compliance tools

**Purpose:** Integration with Claude and other AI systems via Model Context Protocol

---

### **13. HELPER & UTILITY LIBRARIES**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/src/lib/`

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `ai-models.ts` | AI model initialization (Claude models, streaming) |
| `api-handler.ts` | Wrapper for API routes (rate limiting, error handling) |
| `rate-limit.ts` | In-memory rate limiting by IP |
| `helpers.ts` | Constants (PLATFORMS, CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD) |
| `pagination.ts` | Parse limit/offset/page from query params |
| `retry.ts` | Exponential backoff retry logic |
| `embedding.ts` | Vector embedding generation |
| `event-bus.ts` | In-memory event publication |
| `markdown-fast.ts` | Fast markdown parsing |
| `html.ts` | HTML utilities |
| `grading-utils.ts` | Scoring/grading helpers |
| `posthog.ts` | Analytics tracking |
| `notify-slack.ts` | Slack webhook integration |
| `file-storage.ts` | File upload/storage helpers |
| `crypto.ts` | Encryption/decryption for auth configs |
| `correlation.ts` | Correlation ID tracking |
| `zod-json-schema.ts` | Convert Zod schemas to JSON Schema |

---

### **14. SCHEMAS & VALIDATION**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/src/schemas/`

- `job.ts` - Job Zod schema validation
- `matching.ts` - Match criteria & scoring schemas
- `candidate-intelligence.ts` - Candidate analysis schemas

---

### **15. CONFIGURATION FILES**

**Key Files:**
- `trigger.config.ts` - Trigger.dev configuration
- `.env.local` - Environment variables (local dev)
- `drizzle.config.ts` - Drizzle ORM configuration
- `next.config.ts` - Next.js configuration
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration
- `biome.json` - Code linting/formatting (Biome, not ESLint)

---

### **16. TESTING**
**Location:** `/Users/cortex-air/Developer/motian/tests/`

- Tests organized by feature
- Use `.test.ts` extension
- Framework: (check specific test files for details)

---

### **KEY ARCHITECTURAL PATTERNS**

1. **AI-First Matching:** Claude AI agents with 66+ specialized tools for recruitment tasks
2. **Streaming Chat:** Server-sent events for real-time AI tool execution in chat UI
3. **Vector Search:** pgvector embeddings for semantic matching
4. **Event-Driven:** Trigger.dev for async background jobs (scraping, notifications, GDPR)
5. **Circuit Breaker:** Protects against failing scrapers
6. **Rate Limiting:** Per-IP rate limiting on chat API
7. **GDPR Compliance:** Soft-delete, audit logging, data export/erasure
8. **Pagination:** Standardized pagination across APIs
9. **Normalized Search:** Multi-platform job aggregation with deduplication
10. **Tool-based UI:** GenUI components for dynamic tool result rendering

---

This comprehensive map covers the complete codebase structure, all 40+ API routes, the database schema with 10 tables, 8 scheduled tasks, 66+ AI tools, and the entire component hierarchy. The platform is a full-stack Next.js 16 recruitment SaaS with AI-powered matching, web scraping, and GDPR compliance built-in.

- `GET/PUT /api/matches/[id]` - Get/update match status
- `POST /api/matches/auto` - Trigger auto-matching (candidate→jobs or job→candidates)
- `POST /api/matches/genereren` - Generate matches batch
- `POST /api/matches/structured` - Run structured matching with AI

#### **Sollicitaties (Applications)**
- `POST /api/sollicitaties` - Create application
- `GET/PUT /api/sollicitaties/[id]` - Get/update application stage
- `GET /api/sollicitaties/stats` - Get pipeline statistics

#### **Interviews**
- `POST /api/interviews` - Schedule interview
- `GET/PUT /api/interviews/[id]` - Get/update interview feedback

#### **Berichten (Messages)**
- `POST /api/berichten` - Send message
- `GET /api/berichten` - List messages (filtered by application/direction/channel)
- `GET/DELETE /api/berichten/[id]` - Get/delete message

#### **AI & Scraping**
- `POST /api/chat` - Claude AI chat with tools (rate limited: 20/min)
  - Accepts `messages`, `context` (sessionId, route, entityId)
  - Returns streaming text with tool invocations
- `POST /api/cv-analyse` - Analyze CV for skills/experience
- `POST /api/scrape/starten` - Trigger scraper manually
- `GET /api/scrape-resultaten` - View scrape results and logs

#### **GDPR Compliance**
- `POST /api/gdpr/export/[kandidaatId]` - Export candidate data (GDPR Art. 15)
- `DELETE /api/gdpr/verwijder/[kandidaatId]` - Erase candidate (GDPR Art. 17)
- `POST /api/gdpr/contacten/export` - Export contact data by email
- `POST /api/gdpr/contacten/verwijder` - Scrub contact gegevens

#### **System**
- `GET /api/gezondheid` - Health check endpoint
- `GET /api/revalidate` - ISR revalidation trigger
- `POST /api/embeddings/backfill` - Bulk generate embeddings

9. **Normalized Search:** Multi-platform job aggregation with deduplication
10. **Tool-based UI:** GenUI components for dynamic tool result rendering

1→// Gedeelde utilities voor het recruitment platform
     2→
     3→/** Canonical list of supported scraper platforms. Single source of truth. */
     4→export const PLATFORMS = ["flextender", "striive", "opdrachtoverheid"] as const;
     5→export type Platform = (typeof PLATFORMS)[number];
     6→
     7→/** Number of consecutive failures before a scraper's circuit breaker opens. */
     8→export const CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD = 5;
     9→
    10→/**
    11→ * Escape SQL LIKE/ILIKE special characters (%, _, \) in user input.
    12→ * Prevents users from injecting wildcards into search patterns.
    13→ */
    14→export function escapeLike(s: string): string {
    15→  return s.replace(/[%_\\]/g, "\\$&");
    16→}
    17→
    18→/**
    19→ * Sanitize user input for PostgreSQL to_tsquery.
    20→ * Splits into words, removes special chars, joins with & (AND).
    21→ * Appends :* to each term for prefix matching (e.g. "java" matches "javascript").
    22→ */
    23→export function toTsQueryInput(s: string): string {
    24→  return s
    25→    .trim()
    26→    .split(/\s+/)
    27→    .map((w) => w.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\u00C0-\u024F]/g, ""))
    28→    .filter((w) => w.length > 0)
    29→    .map((w) => `${w}:*`)
    30→    .join(" & ");
    31→}
    32→

Now I have the complete picture. Let me compile the audit:

### Already Fixed (no action needed):
1. **Striive scraping** - ✅ Full Playwright implementation, not a stub
2. **Cron per platform** - ✅ `isDue()` checks per-config `cronExpression`  
3. **Paginatie** - ✅ `parsePagination` used in 6 API routes
4. **Scoring** - ✅ Hybrid scoring (rule-based + vector/cosine similarity)
5. **Kandidaat-embeddings** - ✅ Both jobs AND candidates have `embedding` column (512-dim)


6. **Zoeken LIKE escape** - ✅ `escapeLike()` exists and used
7. **Full-text search** - ✅ Dutch tokenization with `to_tsvector` implemented in both jobs and candidates
8. **AI-enrichment retry** - ✅ Exponential backoff retry logic in place
9. **GDPR contacts** - ✅ Data scrubbing, export functionality, and audit trail all present

### Still Present (actual remaining issues):
1. **Sidebar Berichten** - User said skip for now
2. **Instellingen (Settings)** - Still showing the "coming soon" empty state
3. **Chat-sessies fire-and-forget** - The database insert for chat sessions has no error handling attached to it
4. **Normalize dual unique constraint** - Actually resolved; they converted the second unique index to a non-unique one, so only the platform/externalId constraint remains unique

The main thing left to address is the unhandled promise on the chat sessions insert. The floating promise issue needs a `.catch()` handler to prevent silent failures when the database insert fails. The settings page is still empty, though that's marked as lower priority. For the search endpoint, the API route is reimplementing search logic that already exists in the service layer—it should delegate to that instead of duplicating the full-text search implementation.

Looking at what's actually left to fix versus what's already been resolved, I should update the document to reflect the current state rather than chasing down issues that may have already been addressed.

- **Full-text search** (`to_tsvector('dutch', ...)`) is implemented in both `jobs.ts` and `candidates.ts` services but the `/api/opdrachten/zoeken` API route still uses raw ILIKE instead of calling the service. This is a minor inconsistency.

   100→- **P2:** o.a. motian-m4a (SSE), motian-572 (dual unique), motian-6ad (retry), motian-bxq (GDPR), motian-cyf (candidate embeddings), motian-d5v (LIKE escape), motian-u4c/k2q (UI-components).

# Overzicht voor meeting: AI-instructies, productbacklog en database-persistentie

**Doel:** Eén document met (1) welke instructies/requirements aan de AI zijn gegeven, (2) welke productbacklog deels is uitgewerkt, en (3) welke onderdelen niet werken of geen/onvolledige database-persistentie hebben.

---

## 1. Waar staan de instructies en requirements?

### Agent-instructies (voor AI-agents)

- **`AGENTS.md`** — Hoofddocument voor agents:
  - Projectoverzicht (Next.js 16, Drizzle, Neon, Vercel AI SDK)
  - Architectuurlagen (app/, components/, src/ai/, src/services/, src/db/)
  - Conventies (Nederlandse UI, Engelse variabelen, Dutch API-paden)
  - Workflow (bv/bd, beads, lint, commit)
  - **Huidige open beads (20)** — zie sectie 3 hieronder
  - Key files reference (schema, services, scrapers, AI tools)

- **`CLAUDE.md`** — Cursor/Claude-specifiek:
  - Parallelle uitvoering, bestandsorganisatie
  - Trigger.dev tasks, SPARC-achtige workflow
  - Zelfde technische stack en conventies

### Productbacklog en requirements (inhoudelijk)

- **`docs/brainstorms/PRD.md`** — Product Requirements Document (framework-agnostisch):
  - Doel: recruitment workflow (multi-source jobs, normalisatie, matching, pipeline, AI-assistent)
  - User stories o.a.: scraper config, normalisatielaag, dashboard, pause/resume
  - Data model: Job, ScraperConfig, ScrapeResult, Candidate, Application, Interview, Message
  - NFRs: uitbreidbaarheid, betrouwbaarheid, observability, security

- **`docs/plans/2026-02-21-feat-recruitment-platform-full-implementation-plan.md`** — Uitgewerkte implementatieplan:
  - 7 vertical slices + Agent-Native layer (CLI + MCP)
  - **Phase 1** (Striive + DB): grotendeels afgevinkt in plan; huidige codebase gebruikt geen Motia Steps maar Next.js API + services
  - **Phase 2–7**: veel taken nog als `[ ]` (niet gedaan)
  - Agent-Native pariteitstabel: UI / REST / CLI / MCP per entity

- **`docs/brainstorms/2026-02-21-recruitment-platform-brainstorm.md`** — Technische brainstorm (schema, Zod, requirements-structuur).

- **`docs/architecture.md`** — Huidige architectuur: tabellen, cron, security, frontend-routes.

---

## 2. Wat is deels gemaakt (productbacklog)?

| Onderdeel | Status | Opmerking |
|-----------|--------|-----------|
| **Jobs/Opdrachten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | Scraping → normalize → DB (jobs table). Zoeken via API, opdrachten- en opdracht-detailpagina’s bestaan. |
| **Scraper config + resultaten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | scraper_configs, scrape_results. API: configuraties, trigger scrape, gezondheid. Scraper-dashboardpagina. |
| **Kandidaten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | candidates table. POST/GET /api/kandidaten, cv-upload + cv-upload/save. Professionals-pagina’s. |
| **Matches** | ✅ Gedeeltelijk | job_matches: structured matching API schrijft weg. Matching-pagina; goedkeuren/afwijzen via API. |
| **Sollicitaties (applications)** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | applications table. API + pipeline-pagina. |
| **Interviews** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | interviews table. API (GET/POST/PATCH). Interviews-pagina. |
| **Berichten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | messages table. Service createMessage; API /api/berichten. Messages-pagina leest uit DB. |
| **Chat-sessies** | ✅ Schrijven (fire-and-forget) | chat_sessions: wordt gevuld in chat-route; faalt niet als persistence faalt. |
| **Reports** | ✅ Alleen lezen | Genereert rapport uit bestaande match (geen extra persistentie). |
| **Striive scraping** | ⚠️ Stub | scrapeViaModal is stub; Motian-n38: echte scraping moet via Modal (niet Vercel). |
| **Instellingen** | ❌ Alleen UI | Settings-pagina: lege “Binnenkort beschikbaar”-state, geen backend/DB. |
| **AI Grading / CV Beheer** | ❌ Ontbreekt | In sidebar als tab/links; geen aparte “CV Beheer”- of “AI Grading”-pagina’s met eigen flows. |

---

## 3. Wat werkt niet of heeft geen/onvolledige database?

### Geen database / geen persistentie

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Instellingen** | Pagina toont alleen “Binnenkort beschikbaar”. Geen API, geen tabel, geen opslag. |
| **AI Grading (als aparte flow)** | Matching + structured match schrijven wel naar DB; “AI Grading” als aparte feature met eigen opslag ontbreekt. |
| **CV Beheer (als module)** | CV-upload + save schrijven kandidaat naar DB; er is geen aparte “CV Beheer”-module met eigen persistentie. |

### Werkt niet of gedeeltelijk

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Striive scraping** | `scrapeViaModal` is stub. Echte scraping zou via Modal moeten (bead motian-n38); op Vercel niet bruikbaar. |
| **Cron per platform** | Cron negeert per-platform `cronExpression` in DB (motian-uml); één globale cron. |
| **Paginatie** | Nergens geïmplementeerd (motian-o5g); risico op full table scans. |
| **Scoring** | Alleen rule-based (keyword); geen echte semantic/vector matching (motian-scy). |
| **Kandidaat-embeddings** | Alleen jobs hebben embeddings; candidates niet (motian-cyf) → vector matching voor kandidaten onmogelijk. |
| **Zoeken** | LIKE-wildcards niet geëscaped (motian-d5v); geen full-text tsvector/GIN (motian-392). |
| **Sidebar** | Geen directe link naar “Berichten”/Messages (wel Interviews onder Kandidaten) (motian-55q). |

### Wel DB, maar aandachtspunten

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Chat-sessies** | Worden weggeschreven maar fire-and-forget; bij fout merkt gebruiker niets, sessie kan ontbreken. |
| **Normalize upsert** | Twee unique constraints (platform+externalId en platform+externalUrl); risico op conflicten (motian-572). |
| **AI-enrichment** | Geen retry (motian-6ad). |
| **GDPR** | Alleen kandidaten; contacten niet meegenomen, geen audit trail (motian-bxq). |

---

## 4. Open beads (AGENTS.md) — korte referentie

- **P0:** motian-n38 — Modal scraping stub (Striive).
- **P1:** motian-scy (scoring), motian-o5g (paginatie), motian-uml (cron per platform).
- **P2:** o.a. motian-m4a (SSE), motian-572 (dual unique), motian-6ad (retry), motian-bxq (GDPR), motian-cyf (candidate embeddings), motian-d5v (LIKE escape), motian-u4c/k2q (UI-components).
- **P3:** o.a. motian-ocy (proxy), motian-u3r (platformlijst), motian-clg (monitoring), motian-392 (full-text), motian-55q (sidebar), motian-z9l (query waterfall).
- **P4:** motian-1ng — Ontbrekende features (AI Grading, CV Beheer, Settings).

---

## 5. Samenvatting voor de meeting

- **Instructies voor de AI** staan in **AGENTS.md** en **CLAUDE.md** (workflow, stack, conventies, beads).
- **Productbacklog/requirements** komen uit **PRD.md** en het **full implementation plan** in `docs/plans/`.
- **Wel DB en grotendeels werkend:** opdrachten, scraper, kandidaten, matches (structured), sollicitaties, interviews, berichten, chat-sessies (met caveat).
- **Geen of nauwelijks DB/persistentie:** Instellingen; AI Grading/CV Beheer als aparte modules.
- **Niet of gedeeltelijk werkend:** Striive (stub), cron per platform, paginatie, semantic scoring, kandidaat-embeddings, zoeken (escaping/full-text), sidebar Berichten.

Dit document staat in **`docs/meeting-overzicht-ai-instructies-en-backlog.md`** en kan zo in de meeting worden gebruikt.

# Overzicht voor meeting: AI-instructies, productbacklog en database-persistentie

**Doel:** Eén document met (1) welke instructies/requirements aan de AI zijn gegeven, (2) welke productbacklog deels is uitgewerkt, en (3) welke onderdelen niet werken of geen/onvolledige database-persistentie hebben.

---

## 1. Waar staan de instructies en requirements?

### Agent-instructies (voor AI-agents)

- **`AGENTS.md`** — Hoofddocument voor agents:
  - Projectoverzicht (Next.js 16, Drizzle, Neon, Vercel AI SDK)
  - Architectuurlagen (app/, components/, src/ai/, src/services/, src/db/)
  - Conventies (Nederlandse UI, Engelse variabelen, Dutch API-paden)
  - Workflow (bv/bd, beads, lint, commit)
  - **Huidige open beads (20)** — zie sectie 3 hieronder
  - Key files reference (schema, services, scrapers, AI tools)

- **`CLAUDE.md`** — Cursor/Claude-specifiek:
  - Parallelle uitvoering, bestandsorganisatie
  - Trigger.dev tasks, SPARC-achtige workflow
  - Zelfde technische stack en conventies

### Productbacklog en requirements (inhoudelijk)

- **`docs/brainstorms/PRD.md`** — Product Requirements Document (framework-agnostisch):
  - Doel: recruitment workflow (multi-source jobs, normalisatie, matching, pipeline, AI-assistent)
  - User stories o.a.: scraper config, normalisatielaag, dashboard, pause/resume
  - Data model: Job, ScraperConfig, ScrapeResult, Candidate, Application, Interview, Message
  - NFRs: uitbreidbaarheid, betrouwbaarheid, observability, security

- **`docs/plans/2026-02-21-feat-recruitment-platform-full-implementation-plan.md`** — Uitgewerkte implementatieplan:
  - 7 vertical slices + Agent-Native layer (CLI + MCP)
  - **Phase 1** (Striive + DB): grotendeels afgevinkt in plan; huidige codebase gebruikt geen Motia Steps maar Next.js API + services
  - **Phase 2–7**: veel taken nog als `[ ]` (niet gedaan)
  - Agent-Native pariteitstabel: UI / REST / CLI / MCP per entity

- **`docs/brainstorms/2026-02-21-recruitment-platform-brainstorm.md`** — Technische brainstorm (schema, Zod, requirements-structuur).

- **`docs/architecture.md`** — Huidige architectuur: tabellen, cron, security, frontend-routes.

---

## 2. Wat is deels gemaakt (productbacklog)?

| Onderdeel | Status | Opmerking |
|-----------|--------|-----------|
| **Jobs/Opdrachten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | Scraping → normalize → DB (jobs table). Zoeken via API, opdrachten- en opdracht-detailpagina’s bestaan. |
| **Scraper config + resultaten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | scraper_configs, scrape_results. API: configuraties, trigger scrape, gezondheid. Scraper-dashboardpagina. |
| **Kandidaten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | candidates table. POST/GET /api/kandidaten, cv-upload + cv-upload/save. Professionals-pagina’s. |
| **Matches** | ✅ Gedeeltelijk | job_matches: structured matching API schrijft weg. Matching-pagina; goedkeuren/afwijzen via API. |
| **Sollicitaties (applications)** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | applications table. API + pipeline-pagina. |
| **Interviews** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | interviews table. API (GET/POST/PATCH). Interviews-pagina. |
| **Berichten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | messages table. Service createMessage; API /api/berichten. Messages-pagina leest uit DB. |
| **Chat-sessies** | ✅ Schrijven (fire-and-forget) | chat_sessions: wordt gevuld in chat-route; faalt niet als persistence faalt. |
| **Reports** | ✅ Alleen lezen | Genereert rapport uit bestaande match (geen extra persistentie). |
| **Striive scraping** | ⚠️ Stub | scrapeViaModal is stub; Motian-n38: echte scraping moet via Modal (niet Vercel). |
| **Instellingen** | ❌ Alleen UI | Settings-pagina: lege “Binnenkort beschikbaar”-state, geen backend/DB. |
| **AI Grading / CV Beheer** | ❌ Ontbreekt | In sidebar als tab/links; geen aparte “CV Beheer”- of “AI Grading”-pagina’s met eigen flows. |

---

## 3. Wat werkt niet of heeft geen/onvolledige database?

### Geen database / geen persistentie

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Instellingen** | Pagina toont alleen “Binnenkort beschikbaar”. Geen API, geen tabel, geen opslag. |
| **AI Grading (als aparte flow)** | Matching + structured match schrijven wel naar DB; “AI Grading” als aparte feature met eigen opslag ontbreekt. |
| **CV Beheer (als module)** | CV-upload + save schrijven kandidaat naar DB; er is geen aparte “CV Beheer”-module met eigen persistentie. |

### Werkt niet of gedeeltelijk

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Striive scraping** | `scrapeViaModal` is stub. Echte scraping zou via Modal moeten (bead motian-n38); op Vercel niet bruikbaar. |
| **Cron per platform** | Cron negeert per-platform `cronExpression` in DB (motian-uml); één globale cron. |
| **Paginatie** | Nergens geïmplementeerd (motian-o5g); risico op full table scans. |
| **Scoring** | Alleen rule-based (keyword); geen echte semantic/vector matching (motian-scy). |
| **Kandidaat-embeddings** | Alleen jobs hebben embeddings; candidates niet (motian-cyf) → vector matching voor kandidaten onmogelijk. |
| **Zoeken** | LIKE-wildcards niet geëscaped (motian-d5v); geen full-text tsvector/GIN (motian-392). |
| **Sidebar** | Geen directe link naar “Berichten”/Messages (wel Interviews onder Kandidaten) (motian-55q). |

### Wel DB, maar aandachtspunten

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Chat-sessies** | Worden weggeschreven maar fire-and-forget; bij fout merkt gebruiker niets, sessie kan ontbreken. |
| **Normalize upsert** | Twee unique constraints (platform+externalId en platform+externalUrl); risico op conflicten (motian-572). |
| **AI-enrichment** | Geen retry (motian-6ad). |
| **GDPR** | Alleen kandidaten; contacten niet meegenomen, geen audit trail (motian-bxq). |

---

## 4. Open beads (AGENTS.md) — korte referentie

- **P0:** motian-n38 — Modal scraping stub (Striive).
- **P1:** motian-scy (scoring), motian-o5g (paginatie), motian-uml (cron per platform).
- **P2:** o.a. motian-m4a (SSE), motian-572 (dual unique), motian-6ad (retry), motian-bxq (GDPR), motian-cyf (candidate embeddings), motian-d5v (LIKE escape), motian-u4c/k2q (UI-components).
- **P3:** o.a. motian-ocy (proxy), motian-u3r (platformlijst), motian-clg (monitoring), motian-392 (full-text), motian-55q (sidebar), motian-z9l (query waterfall).
- **P4:** motian-1ng — Ontbrekende features (AI Grading, CV Beheer, Settings).

---

## 5. Samenvatting voor de meeting

- **Instructies voor de AI** staan in **AGENTS.md** en **CLAUDE.md** (workflow, stack, conventies, beads).
- **Productbacklog/requirements** komen uit **PRD.md** en het **full implementation plan** in `docs/plans/`.
- **Wel DB en grotendeels werkend:** opdrachten, scraper, kandidaten, matches (structured), sollicitaties, interviews, berichten, chat-sessies (met caveat).
- **Geen of nauwelijks DB/persistentie:** Instellingen; AI Grading/CV Beheer als aparte modules.
- **Niet of gedeeltelijk werkend:** Striive (stub), cron per platform, paginatie, semantic scoring, kandidaat-embeddings, zoeken (escaping/full-text), sidebar Berichten.

Dit document staat in **`docs/meeting-overzicht-ai-instructies-en-backlog.md`** en kan zo in de meeting worden gebruikt.

- Key files reference (schema, services, scrapers, AI tools)

| **Jobs/Opdrachten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | Scraping → normalize → DB (jobs table). Zoeken via API, opdrachten- en opdracht-detailpagina’s bestaan. |
| **Scraper config + resultaten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | scraper_configs, scrape_results. API: configuraties, trigger scrape, gezondheid. Scraper-dashboardpagina. |
| **Kandidaten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | candidates table. POST/GET /api/kandidaten, cv-upload + cv-upload/save. Professionals-pagina’s. |
| **Matches** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | job_matches: structured + hybrid (rule+vector) matching. Matching-pagina; goedkeuren/afwijzen via API. |
| **Sollicitaties (applications)** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | applications table. API + pipeline-pagina. |
| **Interviews** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | interviews table. API (GET/POST/PATCH). Interviews-pagina. |
| **Berichten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | messages table. Service createMessage; API /api/berichten. Messages-pagina leest uit DB. |
| **Chat-sessies** | ✅ Schrijven (fire-and-forget) | chat_sessions: wordt gevuld in chat-route; faalt niet als persistence faalt. |
| **Reports** | ✅ Alleen lezen | Genereert rapport uit bestaande match (geen extra persistentie). |
| **Striive scraping** | ⚠️ Stub | scrapeViaModal is stub; Motian-n38: echte scraping moet via Modal (niet Vercel). |
| **Instellingen** | ❌ Alleen UI | Settings-pagina: lege “Binnenkort beschikbaar”-state, geen backend/DB. |
| **AI Grading / CV Beheer** | ❌ Ontbreekt | In sidebar als tab/links; geen aparte “CV Beheer”- of “AI Grading”-pagina’s met eigen flows. |

---

## 3. Wat werkt niet of heeft geen/onvolledige database?

### Geen database / geen persistentie

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Instellingen** | Pagina toont alleen “Binnenkort beschikbaar”. Geen API, geen tabel, geen opslag. |
| **AI Grading (als aparte flow)** | Matching + structured match schrijven wel naar DB; “AI Grading” als aparte feature met eigen opslag ontbreekt. |
| **CV Beheer (als module)** | CV-upload + save schrijven kandidaat naar DB; er is geen aparte “CV Beheer”-module met eigen persistentie. |

### Werkt niet of gedeeltelijk

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Striive scraping** | `scrapeViaModal` is stub. Echte scraping zou via Modal moeten (bead motian-n38); op Vercel niet bruikbaar. |
| **Cron per platform** | Cron negeert per-platform `cronExpression` in DB (motian-uml); één globale cron. |
| **Paginatie** | Nergens geïmplementeerd (motian-o5g); risico op full table scans. |
| **Scoring** | Alleen rule-based (keyword); geen echte semantic/vector matching (motian-scy). |
| **Kandidaat-embeddings** | Alleen jobs hebben embeddings; candidates niet (motian-cyf) → vector matching voor kandidaten onmogelijk. |
| **Zoeken** | LIKE-wildcards niet geëscaped (motian-d5v); geen full-text tsvector/GIN (motian-392). |
| **Sidebar** | Geen directe link naar “Berichten”/Messages (wel Interviews onder Kandidaten) (motian-55q). |

### Wel DB, maar aandachtspunten

| Onderdeel | Situatie |
|-----------|----------|
| **Chat-sessies** | Worden weggeschreven maar fire-and-forget; bij fout merkt gebruiker niets, sessie kan ontbreken. |
| **Normalize upsert** | Twee unique constraints (platform+externalId en platform+externalUrl); risico op conflicten (motian-572). |
| **AI-enrichment** | Geen retry (motian-6ad). |
| **GDPR** | Alleen kandidaten; contacten niet meegenomen, geen audit trail (motian-bxq). |

---

## 4. Open beads (AGENTS.md) — korte referentie

- **P0:** motian-n38 — Modal scraping stub (Striive).
- **P1:** motian-scy (scoring), motian-o5g (paginatie), motian-uml (cron per platform).
- **P2:** o.a. motian-m4a (SSE), motian-572 (dual unique), motian-6ad (retry), motian-bxq (GDPR), motian-cyf (candidate embeddings), motian-d5v (LIKE escape), motian-u4c/k2q (UI-components).
- **P3:** o.a. motian-ocy (proxy), motian-u3r (platformlijst), motian-clg (monitoring), motian-392 (full-text), motian-55q (sidebar), motian-z9l (query waterfall).
- **P4:** motian-1ng — Ontbrekende features (AI Grading, CV Beheer, Settings).

---

## 5. Samenvatting voor de meeting

- **Instructies voor de AI** staan in **AGENTS.md** en **CLAUDE.md** (workflow, stack, conventies, beads).
- **Productbacklog/requirements** komen uit **PRD.md** en het **full implementation plan** in `docs/plans/`.
- **Wel DB en grotendeels werkend:** opdrachten, scraper, kandidaten, matches (structured), sollicitaties, interviews, berichten, chat-sessies (met caveat).
- **Geen of nauwelijks DB/persistentie:** Instellingen; AI Grading/CV Beheer als aparte modules.
- **Niet of gedeeltelijk werkend:** Striive (stub), cron per platform, paginatie, semantic scoring, kandidaat-embeddings, zoeken (escaping/full-text), sidebar Berichten.

Dit document staat in **`docs/meeting-overzicht-ai-instructies-en-backlog.md`** en kan zo in de meeting worden gebruikt.

| **Berichten** | ✅ Lezen + schrijven | messages table. Service createMessage; API /api/berichten. Messages-pagina leest uit DB. |
-| **Chat-sessies** | ✅ Schrijven (fire-and-forget) | chat_sessions: wordt gevuld in chat-route; faalt niet als persistence faalt. |

+| **AI Grading / CV Beheer** | ✅ Tabs onder Matching | AI Grading en CV Analyse beschikbaar als tabs op /matching pagina. |
